message:
fix: normalize nvidia-operators JSON key and add dashboard import rollback (#3138, #3145) (#3164)

- mcp.go: single-cluster nvidia-operators endpoint now returns "operators"
  (array) instead of "operator" (singular), matching the multi-cluster
  response shape and preventing frontend parse errors.
- dashboard.go: ImportDashboard rolls back the partially-created dashboard
  when a card creation fails, preventing orphaned records.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
